title: After-hours: WTI -1.1% to $88.60, Brent -0.6% to $94.89 on Trump ceasefire extension
snippet: TheStreet focuses on the after-hours oil price decline following Trump's ceasefire extension. WTI fell to $88.60 (-1.1%), Brent to $94.89 (-0.6%). The report frames this as a modest relief rally given the extension removes the immediate threat of war resumption.
tag_reason: 시간외 유가 하락에 초점을 맞춘 TheStreet의 독자적 시장 분석. 전쟁 재개 위협 제거에 따른 완화 랠리로 해석.
